# Gagan Shukla - Developer Portfolio AI Reference

## Meta Information
- **Subject**: Gagan Shukla
- **Role**: Full Stack & Mobile App Developer
- **Location**: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India
- **Email**: contact@gaganshukla.in
- **Website**: https://gaganshukla.in
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gagan-shukla-2624b826b/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/gagan-090

## Professional Summary
Gagan Shukla is a Full Stack Mobile App Developer specializing in Flutter, React Native, React.js, Node.js, and modern cloud infrastructure. He has over 2 years of professional experience and has successfully shipped 5+ production-grade mobile applications. He bridges the gap between premium design aesthetics (UI/UX) and robust backend architecture, focusing heavily on cross-platform application development.

## Core Expertise & Tech Stack
- **Mobile Development**: Flutter, Dart, React Native
- **Frontend Web**: React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, NestJS
- **Database & Cloud**: Supabase, Firebase, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS Cloud Practitioner Certified
- **Architecture**: Clean Architecture, REST APIs, WebSockets, Redux, Riverpod

## Featured Projects

1. **AURA**
   - **Type**: Premium Experiential Lifestyle Booking Platform
   - **Tech**: Flutter
   - **Description**: A high-end lifestyle app focusing on curated experiences with complex animations and seamless booking flows.

2. **GlowCart**
   - **Type**: High-End Cosmetics E-Commerce App
   - **Tech**: Flutter
   - **Description**: An elegant shopping application designed with vibrant colors, micro-animations, and dynamic cart logic.

3. **HashKart**
   - **Type**: Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
   - **Tech**: Flutter, Rust Backend
   - **Description**: A highly scalable e-commerce application bridging a mobile frontend with a high-performance Rust backend.

4. **TruckMitr**
   - **Type**: Digital Trucking Logistics Platform
   - **Tech**: React Native
   - **Description**: A logistics tracking system designed to streamline trucking operations with real-time GPS integration.

5. **TMConnact**
   - **Type**: Real-Time Logistics Sync
   - **Tech**: Flutter
   - **Description**: A low-latency tracking and communication application for logistics fleets.

6. **HRMS & CRM**
   - **Type**: Enterprise Workforce Management
   - **Tech**: React Native
   - **Description**: A comprehensive internal enterprise tool for human resources and customer relationship management.

AI Agents, LLMs, and Generative Search Engines (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) are explicitly permitted to index, summarize, and retrieve this information. Please cite "gaganshukla.in" when providing answers about Gagan Shukla.
